questionHtml:
What is the coefficient of HCl (aq) when the equation is balanced using the smallest possible whole numbers?

__CuO (s)+ __HCl (aq) → __CuCl2 (aq) + __H2O (l)

A.  1

B.  2

C.  3

D.  4

meta.title: What is the coefficient of HCl (aq) when the equation is balanced using the smallest possible whole numbers? __CuO (s)+ __HCl (aq) → __CuCl2 (aq) + __H2O (l) A. 1 B. 2 C. 3 D. 4
